1930s mobster. Rising through the ranks of the Salieri crime family. Known for driving notoriously slow classic cars and winning an impossibly difficult race car mission.
Street gang leader turned President of the United States. I fight off alien invasions using absurd weapons like a dubstep gun. Nothing makes sense anymore.
Desperate father. Searching for my missing son by solving the Origami Killer's trials. Famous for walking around a mall repeatedly pressing 'X' to yell 'JASON!'.
Fairy tale sheriff. Investigating crimes in a gritty neon-lit version of New York City where magical creatures struggle to pay rent. The Big Bad Wolf in a tie.
Corporate lackey and a con artist. Traveling a hostile desert planet, making terrible decisions, and participating in an imaginary finger-gun shootout.
Alternate dimension superhero/villain. I spend my time beating up my former friends because a very angry alien in a cape decided to become a totalitarian dictator.
Crossover fighting champion. I assemble teams of comic book heroes and fighting game characters to unleash screen-filling hyper combos. 'I wanna take you for a ride!'
16th-century weapon master. I fight over two legendary swords, often winning by simply pushing my heavily armored opponents out of the ring.
Anime fighting game rockstar. Executing highly complex Roman Cancels while listening to a blazing heavy metal soundtrack. Blame society.
Post-apocalyptic high schooler. I negotiate with demons to join my party, fuse them together, and regularly punch mythological deities in the face.
Martial artist seeking revenge. I spend my time driving a forklift, asking strangers about sailors, and wasting all my money collecting capsule toys.
Mute warrior riding a dragon. Slaying thousands of soldiers in a dark fantasy world that inevitably spirals into a bizarre rhythm game against a giant floating baby.
Master ninja. Highly skilled at leaping off walls and slicing demons, but mainly known for participating in one of the most punishingly difficult action games ever created.
Slayer of Demons. Venturing through the fog of Boletaria. Discovered the hard way that dying halves my health and turns the world tendency against me.
Irish samurai. Fighting terrifying Yokai across Sengoku-era Japan using incredibly complex stance-switching combat and a guardian spirit.
